instruction: Apply the approval policy to this quote request and return the required decision.
rationale_hint: Gate G2 (customer.has_overdue_invoices must be false) fails. The complete discount logic trail (B1, B2, effective 13 %, P4 bracket → ESCALATE_DIRECTOR) is a distractor — gates evaluate first and dominate everything that follows. DECLINE.

provenance.source_benchmark: CRMArena-Pro Workflow Execution (Huang et al., 2025); World of Workflows Constraint Understanding (Skyfall Research, 2025); WorkBench no-action subset (Styles et al., 2024); FlowBench rule-following (Xiao et al., 2024)
provenance.adaptation: Author-constructed quote request and approval policy; task semantics follow the rule-application + no-action pattern of the cited benchmarks. No benchmark text or data is reproduced. Sub-class: no_action_gate_dominates_full_chain.
provenance.license: Original work by the author (rule set, quote requests, task design); benchmark semantics reference only
